title: ochna parviflora
intro: Ochna parviflora, also known as the Mickey Mouse plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and possessing antiviral properties. The leaves and roots of the Ochna parviflora plant are used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes.
